title: A Look Back at Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Love Story, From a Friendship Bracelet to a Star-Studded Wedding
summary: From Kelce putting the singer on blast on his 'New Heights' podcast to Swift breaking the internet with her Chiefs game appearances to the engagement seen around the world, here's a timeline of their whirlwind romance.

title: Donna Kelce Reacts to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Wedding
summary: The Grammy winner and NFL star tied the knot at New York City's Madison Square Garden on Friday.

title: Extreme heat wave threatens U.S. power grids and July 4 travel
summary: The heat wave threatens to overwhelm U.S. grids and may force some to change their plans on one of the busiest travel weeks of the year.
